name: Buttered Spaghetti- Shrimp - Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté the garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
3. Add the shrimp, peeled and deveined, and sliced mushrooms to the skillet. Cook slowly for 5 minutes, tossing occasionally.
4. Stir in the spaghetti, Romano cheese, salt, white wine, and lemon juice.
5. Continue cooking for a few more minutes, stirring frequently, until all ingredients are heated through and combined.
6. Serve immediately.
